workspace.name: ACMHP
workspace.description: Australian Association of Culturally and Linguistically Diverse Mental Health Practitioners

open.name: announcements
open.purpose_en: Official ACMHP announcements — events, governance updates, milestones, and member recognition.
open.purpose_cn: ACMHP官方公告 — 活动、治理更新、里程碑及会员表彰。
open.topic: Post permissions: Committee only | 发布权限：仅委员会成员 | React with :white_check_mark: to acknowledge

open.name: introductions
open.purpose_en: Welcome new members! Share who you are, your practice background, and what brought you to ACMHP.
open.purpose_cn: 欢迎新成员！分享你的背景、专业领域，以及加入ACMHP的原因。
open.topic: Introduce yourself in English, 中文, or both! :earth_asia: 用英文、中文或双语介绍自己！

open.name: events
open.purpose_en: Upcoming ACMHP events — peer supervision sessions, seminars, book club, body-mind healing workshops, AGM, and external events of interest.
open.purpose_cn: ACMHP活动信息 — 同辈督导、研讨会、读书会、身心疗愈工作坊、年度大会及相关外部活动。
open.topic: :date: Check pinned post for the full 2026 event calendar | 查看置顶消息获取2026年完整活动日历

open.name: resources
open.purpose_en: Share articles, research papers, tools, training opportunities, and clinical resources relevant to CALD mental health practice.
open.purpose_cn: 分享与多元文化心理健康实践相关的文章、研究论文、工具、培训机会和临床资源。
open.topic: Use threads to discuss shared resources :thread: 请使用话题讨论分享的资源

open.name: peer-support
open.purpose_en: Peer consultation, practice reflections, and professional support for CALD practitioners. A safe space for sharing challenges and insights.
open.purpose_cn: 同辈咨询、实践反思及多元文化从业者的专业支持。安全空间，分享挑战与见解。
open.topic: :warning: No client-identifying info | 请勿发布可识别来访者身份的信息 | Confidentiality first 保密优先

open.name: social
open.purpose_en: Off-topic chat, celebrations, food recommendations, memes, and getting to know each other beyond work. :tada:
open.purpose_cn: 工作以外的闲聊、庆祝、美食推荐、趣图，认识彼此更多面 :tada:

private.name: committee
private.purpose_en: General committee discussion — quick decisions, cross-workstream coordination, and anything that doesn't fit a specific channel.
private.purpose_cn: 委员会综合讨论 — 快速决策、跨工作流协调及其他议题。
private.topic: :house: Committee home base | 委员会大本营 | Use specific channels for grants, events, governance where possible

private.name: grants
private.purpose_en: Grant identification, application drafting, budget construction, deadlines, and funding strategy. Track all active and upcoming applications here.
private.purpose_cn: 资助识别、申请撰写、预算编制、截止日期及资金策略。在此追踪所有进行中和即将到来的申请。
private.topic: :clipboard: Active: CCHH Small Stream (due TBC) | Lyra Taylor #0080 | Volunteer Grants 2025-26 EOI sent

private.name: governance
private.purpose_en: Meeting minutes, AGM preparation, ACNC compliance, Consumer Affairs Victoria obligations, constitution amendments, and committee elections.
private.purpose_cn: 会议纪要、年度大会准备、ACNC合规、维州消费者事务义务、章程修订及委员会选举。
private.topic: :scroll: AIR Act 2012 compliance | ACNC annual reporting | Quorum = [X] members

private.name: events-planning
private.purpose_en: Event logistics, venue booking, speaker coordination, promotional material, and post-event reviews. The behind-the-scenes of #events.
private.purpose_cn: 活动后勤、场地预订、演讲者协调、宣传材料及活动回顾。#events 频道的幕后工作区。

private.name: research
private.purpose_en: Practice research coordination — Lyra Taylor EMDR project, culturally adapted cognition checklist development, literature reviews, and future research directions.
private.purpose_cn: 实践研究协调 — Lyra Taylor EMDR项目、文化适应认知清单开发、文献综述及未来研究方向。
private.topic: :microscope: Lead: Daria (Xuejiao) Li | Current: EMDR culturally adapted cognition checklist

private.name: finance
private.purpose_en: Budget tracking, reimbursement requests, financial reporting, and treasurer updates. Keep financial discussions consolidated here.
private.purpose_cn: 预算追踪、报销申请、财务报告及财务主管更新。所有财务讨论集中在此。

threads.en: Reply in threads to keep channels readable. Especially important in #resources and #peer-support where discussions can get deep.
threads.cn: 请使用话题回复以保持频道整洁，尤其在资源分享和同伴支持频道。

bilingual.en: Post in English, Chinese, or both — whatever feels natural. We value linguistic diversity as a strength.
bilingual.cn: 可以用英文、中文或双语发帖——用你最自然的方式。我们视语言多样性为力量。

pinning.en: Pin key documents, deadlines, and decisions in each channel. Use pinned messages as a lightweight 'channel wiki'.
pinning.cn: 在每个频道置顶关键文档、截止日期和决策，作为频道的简易知识库。

notifications.en: Mute #social if it gets noisy. Set #announcements and your committee channels to 'All messages'. Everything else can be 'Mentions only'.
notifications.cn: 如果闲聊太多可静音#social。将#announcements和委员会频道设为'所有消息'，其他设为'仅提及'。

confidentiality.en: Never share client-identifying information in any channel. Committee channels are private but not encrypted — treat accordingly.
confidentiality.cn: 任何频道均不得分享可识别来访者身份的信息。委员会频道虽为私密但非加密，请谨慎处理。

setup_checklist: Copy bilingual purposes from this guide into each channel's description
Set channel topics using the suggested topics
Invite committee members to all private channels
Restrict posting in #announcements to workspace admins
Pin a welcome message / confidentiality reminder in #peer-support
